title: cocculus selwynii
intro: Cocculus selwynii, also known as New Zealand dodonaea or Makura, is a plant native to New Zealand, known for its unique properties. The medicinal properties of Cocculus selwynii include its ability to act as a sedative, and its extracts have been used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress levels, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. Cocculus selwynii is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and is used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
